name: UGC Testimonial
description: Authentic-feeling user testimony with real results and emotional language. Looks organic, not produced.
visual_rules: Casual composition, slightly imperfect framing. Person in natural environment (home office, desk). Smartphone-style portrait or slight tilt. Muted or desaturated background. Text overlay in handwritten or system font. No heavy branding.
copy_guidance: First-person voice. Specific numbers (profit amounts, time saved, account growth). Skeptic-to-believer arc. 'I never thought I'd...' or 'This changed everything for me' hooks.

name: Bold Billboard
description: Maximum-impact single statement. Headline dominates the frame. Zero clutter.
visual_rules: 90%+ of frame is the headline text. Stark contrast — white or neon on black, or black on white. Minimal or abstract background. Brand color used sparingly as accent. Large weight, tight tracking. CTA small at the bottom.
copy_guidance: 5 words or fewer for the main hook. Provocative or contrarian. Numbers work well ('$147 once. Runs forever.'). Avoid explaining — state the claim boldly.

name: Before / After
description: Split visual or sequential contrast showing transformation. The gap between states is the product.
visual_rules: Two-panel split (left/right or top/bottom) or single image with before/after overlay text. Left/top = dull, stressed, chaotic. Right/bottom = clean, calm, profitable. Sharp dividing line or dramatic color shift between panels.
copy_guidance: 'Before: [pain]. After: [outcome].' Keep parallel structure. Time frame adds credibility ('After 30 days'). Trader-specific contrast: manual stress → automated calm.

name: Authority / Expert
description: Positions the product as the professional-grade choice. Sophisticated, institutional feel.
visual_rules: Clean, structured layout. Data visualizations, charts, or technical elements in background. Dark background preferred. Monospace or condensed sans-serif type. Subtle grid or data pattern overlay. Zero decorative elements — everything is functional.
copy_guidance: Technical language used confidently. Stats and metrics. 'Used by serious traders.' Differentiation from casual/retail approach. Performance-focused, not lifestyle.

name: Social Proof Stack
description: Multiple proof points layered together — reviews, numbers, testimonials — creating overwhelming credibility.
visual_rules: Stacked cards or tiles, each with a review or stat. Slightly offset arrangement or mosaic. Mix of star ratings, quote snippets, and result numbers. Clean background so the stack is the focus. Brand color as a subtle connective thread.
copy_guidance: Real-sounding names and results. Mix specificity ('$2,847 in 3 weeks') with emotional wins ('Finally sleeping through the night'). Include a unifying headline above or below the stack.

name: Problem Callout
description: Calls out the exact pain the target avatar lives with. Creates immediate recognition and emotional resonance.
visual_rules: High-contrast, slightly uncomfortable visual energy. Red or amber accent colors. Distressed or high-contrast background. The problem text is the hero element. No aspirational imagery — stay in the pain.
copy_guidance: 'Still doing X?' or 'Tired of Y?' format. Name the specific pain precisely. The product is the implicit escape — don't mention it until the CTA. The more specific the problem, the stronger the hook.

name: Listicle / Benefits
description: Numbered or bulleted list of benefits or features. Scannable, logical, satisfying.
visual_rules: Vertical list layout. Clean left-aligned text. Checkmarks, numbers, or custom icons in brand color. White or dark background. Each item on its own line with generous spacing. Small CTA at the bottom.
copy_guidance: 3-6 items max. Start each with a verb ('Trades 24/7', 'Eliminates emotion', 'Works while you sleep'). Mix functional benefits with emotional ones. Last item should be the most compelling.

name: Native Screenshot
description: Looks like a real screenshot from a phone, app, or trading platform. Maximum believability.
visual_rules: Phone frame or browser chrome around the content. Realistic UI elements (notifications, status bars, platform UI). Slightly messy or candid feel — not too polished. Light mode for contrast. Real-looking data in the screenshot.
copy_guidance: The screenshot IS the copy. Minimal or no overlay text. If text is needed, use an arrow pointing to key number or result. The visual tells the story.

name: Stat Infographic
description: One powerful statistic or data point displayed with maximum visual impact.
visual_rules: The number is 60%+ of the frame. Supporting context in small text below or beside it. Clean, data-viz aesthetic. Grid lines, minimal chart elements as background decoration. Dark background with neon or white number.
copy_guidance: Single most compelling number (win rate, average pips, accounts running, uptime %). Context below the number: 'Verified backtest — XAUUSD, Jan 2022–Dec 2024.' Don't over-explain.

name: Offer / Promotion
description: Price, deal, or value proposition front and center. Urgency-driven conversion creative.
visual_rules: Price tag, badge, or starburst element. High contrast — often inverted from brand palette. Countdown timer element if applicable. Clear visual hierarchy: offer → price → CTA. Slightly promotional energy without being cheap.
copy_guidance: 'Lifetime access for $147' is the hook. Anchor with what they'd pay for alternatives. Strike-through pricing or 'normally $X'. 'One-time' and 'no subscription' are powerful modifiers for this audience.

name: Editorial / Advertorial
description: Looks like a news article, blog post, or magazine feature. Lowers ad resistance.
visual_rules: Newspaper or magazine layout. Serif headline font. Column grid. Fake publication logo or 'Sponsored' label (but realistic-looking). Drop cap or pull quote. Photo in article style. Muted, editorial color palette.
copy_guidance: 'Trading Bot Outperforms Manual Traders by 340% — Here's Why' headline style. Story format. Quote from 'a trader who tested it.' Neutral journalistic tone that gradually reveals the product. CTA is soft: 'Learn more' or 'See the results.'

name: Pain → Agitate → Solve
description: Classic copywriting framework in visual form. Names the pain, intensifies it, then presents relief.
visual_rules: Three clear visual sections or panels. Section 1 (Pain): dark, heavy. Section 2 (Agitate): chaotic or intense. Section 3 (Solve): clean, bright, relief. Color transitions from dark/red → amber → green/neon. Each section has a clear headline.
copy_guidance: Pain: 'You're losing trades because of emotion.' Agitate: 'Every manual decision costs you — stress, sleep, and profits.' Solve: 'The bot trades on rules. No emotion. No hesitation.' Keep each section to one punchy sentence.

name: Curiosity Gap
description: Opens a loop in the viewer's mind. Something is hidden or revealed partially — they need to click.
visual_rules: Partially obscured element (blurred numbers, hidden graph result). Question mark or 'reveal' visual device. Dark or foggy background with one illuminated element. Tension between shown and hidden. Clean, minimal — the gap IS the creative.
copy_guidance: 'What happened when I ran this bot for 90 days?' or 'The trading result most EAs hide.' Promise something specific but don't deliver it in the ad. The CTA delivers the answer.

name: Trust Builder
description: Addresses objections and skepticism directly. Builds credibility through transparency and proof.
visual_rules: Clean, professional, slightly clinical. Logos, badges, certifications if available. Real data presented clearly. No hype colors — neutral or brand-dark palette. Structured layout with clear sections. Professional photography style.
copy_guidance: 'Here's what I can and can't promise.' Money-back guarantee prominent. Real backtest data. 'No, this isn't a get-rich scheme.' Transparent tone disarms skeptics. CTA is low-pressure: 'See the full results.'

name: Lifestyle Aspiration
description: Sells the outcome lifestyle, not the product features. Freedom, time, income without the grind.
visual_rules: Aspirational photography: person at laptop in café or beach, checking phone relaxed, enjoying time with family. Bright, warm, or soft lighting. Wide shot or environmental portrait. Brand overlay minimal — lifestyle IS the creative.
copy_guidance: Don't mention the bot until the last line or CTA. Lead with the life: 'Markets open at 3am. You're asleep. The bot trades.' Outcome > feature. 'Freedom to live your life' framing. Perfect for cold traffic.

name: Product Demo
description: Shows the product working. For a trading EA: real trades, real MT5 interface, real results.
visual_rules: MetaTrader 5 interface or terminal screenshot as hero. Green profits visible. Clean composition with phone or monitor showing the EA running. Data-heavy but organized. Dark terminal background. Numbers are the visual.
copy_guidance: 'Watch it trade live' or 'Here's a real trade from Tuesday.' Specific currency pair, entry, exit, profit in pips. Removes abstraction — this is real. CTA: 'See more verified results.'
